core_arc: Child participates in a competition or team activity and learns about teamwork.

personalisation_slots.NAME: Child's first name
personalisation_slots.LOCATION: Where they play — the field, the gym, the playground

scenes.outline: Today was the big [SPORT] game. [NAME] was excited but also a bit nervous.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] getting ready for the game, mix of excitement and nerves visible.

scenes.outline: [NAME] went to [LOCATION]. [FRIEND] was there. 'We can do this!' said [FRIEND].
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] arriving at [LOCATION], [FRIEND] greeting them with encouragement.

scenes.outline: The game began. [NAME] tried hard. It was not easy but [NAME] kept going.
[NAME] made a mistake. 'Oh no,' thought [NAME]. But [FRIEND] said, 'It's okay! Keep trying!'
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] looking disappointed, [FRIEND] offering encouragement and support.

scenes.outline: [NAME] took a deep breath and tried again. This time it worked! '[NAME] did it!' shouted [FRIEND].
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] succeeding at a play, [FRIEND] celebrating, triumph moment.

scenes.outline: The team worked together. Everyone helped. That was what made them strong.
scenes.illustration_brief: Team moment, all players working together, sense of unity.

scenes.outline: The game ended. Win or lose, [NAME] felt happy. They had done their best.
scenes.illustration_brief: End of game, [NAME] looking satisfied regardless of outcome.

scenes.outline: 'Good game,' said [FRIEND]. [NAME] smiled. The best part was playing together.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] and [FRIEND] together after the game, happy and connected.

comprehension_questions.inference: How do you think [NAME] felt when they made a mistake?
comprehension_questions.prediction: What will [NAME] do differently next game?

writing_worksheet.level_1_2: Trace and write: g, m, r, n. Copy the word: game.
writing_worksheet.level_3_4: Write these words from the story: team, tried, together. Write about a game you like.
writing_worksheet.level_5_6: Write 2 sentences about teamwork. Why is it good to be part of a team?

space.flavour_detail: The ball flew like a rocket.

football.flavour_detail: The ball zoomed across the grass.

animals.flavour_detail: They had to balance like careful animals.

baking.flavour_detail: They passed the baton like passing a spoon.

nature.flavour_detail: They jumped over logs and ducked under branches.

vehicles.flavour_detail: The karts zoomed around the corners.

music.flavour_detail: When the music stopped, they had to freeze.

art.flavour_detail: They had to find hidden pictures.
